headline: How ChargePoint Plans To Ride The EV Wave
summary: Electric vehicles have been around for quite some time. The biggest challenge to validate EVs has been developing the infrastructure to compete with brand name gas stations since battery-operated vehicles constantly need charges to be viable on the road for extended periods of time.
